case_title: OLEG VYACHESLAVOVICH CHECHERIN VS. AT&T MOBILITY LLC

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT IS "APPROVED", AND TRIAL CONTINUED TO JUL-16-2012 AT 1:30 PM DEPT.#506 - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-06-2012 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2012 - CONTINUED TO AUG-06-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PARTIES APPEARED AND DID NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHECHERIN, OLEG VYACHESLAVOVICH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AT&T MOBILITY LLC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
